intro.description_1: The ketogenic diet is a low-carb, high-fat eating style that helps your body enter ketosis and use fat as its primary energy source.
intro.description_2: StayKeto guides you through this process: log your meals, track your macros, and monitor your progress with clear and easy-to-understand charts.
intro.card_progress_text: Visualize your progress with clear charts.

keto_diet_info.title: 🥓 Discover the Keto Diet
keto_diet_info.paragraph_1: The ketogenic (Keto) diet is a low-carb, high-fat eating plan that helps your body enter ketosis, a metabolic state where it burns fat as its primary source of energy.
keto_diet_info.paragraph_2: It has many proven benefits for weight loss, health, and performance, backed by over 50 studies. That is why an increasing number of doctors and health professionals recommend it.
keto_diet_info.paragraph_3: A ketogenic diet can help you burn excess body fat without going hungry, as well as improve type 2 diabetes and metabolic syndrome.
keto_diet_info.benefit_list_1: 📋 Log your meals and maintain a correct keto balance.
keto_diet_info.benefit_list_2: 📊 Track your progress with ketosis and weight charts.
keto_diet_info.benefit_list_3: 💡 Receive personalized tips based on your goals.
keto_diet_info.box_fat: 🔥 Burn body fat without going hungry
keto_diet_info.box_diabetes: 💉 Improve type 2 diabetes and metabolic syndrome

allowed_foods.title: Explore Foods
allowed_foods.info_alert: Search for a food item and check if it fits the ketogenic diet. (Keto or No Keto)
allowed_foods.error_not_found: No food items found with that term

recipe_1.title: Keto Cheese and Spinach Omelette
recipe_1.description: A fluffy omelette, high in protein and low in carbs.

recipe_2.title: Keto Avocado Salad
recipe_2.description: Fresh and delicious, perfect for a light lunch.

recipe_3.title: Mashed Cauliflower with Brown Butter
recipe_3.description: With the perfect combination of creamy cauliflower, golden onions, mouth-watering cheddar cheese, and delicious brown butter, this low-carb cauliflower mash recipe cannot go wrong. And it's exquisite!

recipe_4.title: Low-Carb Zucchini Spaghetti Bolognese
recipe_4.description: Missing pasta? Tonight you can enjoy a pasta dish without the carbs, featuring a hint of umami and a touch of garlic. You will never miss a good plate of spaghetti Bolognese again!
ingredients: 1 tbsp dried oregano or dried basil
